mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO tbl_board (title, content, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board
WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT board_id, title, writer, created_at FROM tbl_board WHERE is_deleted = false
ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{count} OFFSET #{skip}
